lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. The engine and transmission function perfectly.
The car is in mint condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver. The engine starts reliably and the transmission shifts as expected, though the car shows clear signs of its age and mileage. You will find some cosmetic imperfections on the exterior, such as minor scratches and paint fading, and the interior shows typical wear on the seats and carpet. It is a solid, functional vehicle for someone seeking a budget-friendly and honest commuter.

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, truly a rare find. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips or scratches. Inside, the cabin is immaculate and retains its original new-car scent, with the leather upholstery and trim showing zero signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership, offering a smooth, quiet, and powerful performance. This is a collector-quality example that comes with a complete service history and requires no additional work.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable ride! This car has been a faithful companion and is still going strong, offering solid performance for its next owner. While it shows some expected signs of use and minor cosmetic wear consistent with its age, it remains a practical and functional choice for anyone looking for a reliable vehicle that gets the job done at a great value!

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical secondary market. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a cabin preserved in its original, showroom-fresh state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its factory delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine automotive asset.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. I've babied this car from day one—it’s in absolutely pristine condition, inside and out! It’s basically like it just rolled off the lot. If you're looking for something that looks and drives like a dream, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in concours-level condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated double-VANOS system. The chassis integrity is superlative, featuring a documented rear subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry with Bilstein B16 dampers. Power is delivered via the desirable Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque vectoring. Every mechanical component, including proactive rod bearing replacement and a full cooling system overhaul, has been addressed to maintain peak thermal efficiency and rotational balance. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the aesthetic condition is flawless, exhibiting zero paint imperfections or interior bolster wear. A turn-key example for the discerning collector seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Spotless interior. Mechanically perfect. Clean title. Ready for pickup.

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior features a deep, swirl-free gloss protected by a professional ceramic coating, with zero rock chips, scratches, or dings to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine state; the premium leather is supple with no bolster wear, and it retains that fresh, new-car scent from a strictly smoke-free and pet-free environment. Mechanically, the car is flawless, boasting a comprehensive dealership service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. It delivers a factory-perfect driving experience—tight, responsive, and incredibly quiet. The sale includes both original keys, all owner’s manuals, and a clean title. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly preserved example that looks and drives as if it just left the assembly line.

Presented in showroom-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance and preservation. Every facet of this motorcar, from its flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that is exceedingly rare in the pre-owned market. Mechanically sound and aesthetically impeccable, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly pristine condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic imperfections and a flawless mechanical profile. Every detail, from the factory-original finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, reflects a history of fastidious care. This is a definitive collector-grade offering for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells brand new! I’ve babied it since day one, and it’s been garage-kept and kept sparkling clean. You really have to see it to believe how flawless it is. It's perfect for someone who wants that 'new car' feel and a smooth ride. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Presenting a concours-level E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This specimen boasts a pristine factory finish with zero track time. Mechanically flawless, the high-revving powerplant benefits from proactive rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The M-DCT gearbox delivers lightning-fast shifts, paired with an active M-differential for optimal torque vectoring. Equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC), the chassis maintains surgical precision. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, this is a collector-grade example of BMW’s high-RPM pinnacle.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Flawless interior. Recent service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free from swirl marks, stone chips, or any surface imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery is firm, uncreased, and unmarked, while the original carpets have been protected by factory mats since new. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, operates with out-of-the-box precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive history of preventative maintenance and a meticulously detailed engine bay. It delivers the tight, responsive, and silent ride quality of a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a genuine time-capsule piece that has been climate-control garaged, pampered,

We are honored to present this peerless vehicle, maintained to an impeccable showroom standard. This specimen represents the zenith of its class, offering a flawless exterior finish and an interior preserved in absolute pristine condition. Meticulously curated and mechanically beyond reproach, this vehicle is a definitive acquisition for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising excellence. Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional pedigree, maintained in truly pristine condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail adheres to showroom specifications, ensuring an ownership experience indistinguishable from new. We invite you to acquire this benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey there! You have to check out this absolute beauty—it’s seriously in pristine condition! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dings, just pure perfection inside and out. It’s been my pride and joy, but it’s time for someone else to fall in love with this flawless ride. You won't find another one this clean!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp with a 7,900 RPM redline through six individual throttle bodies. The powertrain is mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. Mechanically flawless, it has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance including a VANOS overhaul, rod bearing replacement, and rear subframe reinforcement. The suspension geometry remains taut, utilizing factory-spec bushings and dampers to preserve its telepathic steering response. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, this specimen exhibits zero paint metamerism or interior bolster wear. A turnkey masterpiece for the discerning collector.
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom-fresh state, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since its initial purchase. The exterior finish retains its deep, factory-original luster with zero imperfections, scratches, or stone chips to the bodywork. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium upholstery shows no signs of creasing or wear, and the original carpets have been protected by custom mats from day one. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has followed a rigorous, proactive maintenance schedule with every service documented by authorized technicians. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage shows no signs of exposure to the elements or road debris. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a collector-grade vehicle for the discerning enthusiast who settles for nothing less than absolute perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute mint condition. This specimen exhibits an unrivaled level of preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, smoke-free interior that retains its original showroom character. Meticulously serviced and mechanically beyond reproach, this motorcar offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast. It represents a rare opportunity to acquire a premier investment-grade vehicle of the highest caliber.

Presenting an investment-grade vehicle of unparalleled caliber. This specimen exemplifies automotive excellence, preserved in showroom condition with meticulous attention to every mechanical and aesthetic detail. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection and uncompromising performance.

Hey there! I’m so excited to be listing this absolute beauty! Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it really shows. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Presenting an investment-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 FD, featuring the legendary 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine. This specimen boasts impeccable mechanical integrity, with the complex vacuum system and solenoid rack maintained to factory specifications for seamless boost delivery. The chassis preserves its original 50/50 weight distribution and aluminum double-wishbone suspension
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Low mileage. Service records included.
